'''鈭歯g-w-l-y''' ('''kangawleyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:charabanc|charabanc]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-l-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:charabanc|charabanc]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-w-l-y
|-
! Lemma
| kangawleyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingawleyoko|thingawleyoko]] || [[word:jingawleyoko|jingawleyoko]] || [[word:shingawleyoko|shingawleyoko]] || [[word:kingawleyoko|kingawleyoko]]
|-
